task_description: Write an incident report for a DNS misconfiguration that caused intermittent API failures affecting mobile app users for 2 hours.

input_data.system: Cloud DNS configuration for mobile backend API
input_data.context: A routine DNS record update for the API gateway accidentally removed a CNAME record for the mobile API subdomain. The issue was intermittent because cached DNS entries continued to work for some users while others received NXDOMAIN errors. The on-call engineer initially misdiagnosed it as a load balancer issue.
